//: Root tsconfig — apps and packages each have their own, but esbuild's per-file tsconfig discovery (used by tsx 4 / esbuild 0.27+) sometimes walks up past a package's own tsconfig if the package didn't carry every flag esbuild looks for. Declaring experimentalDecorators here too is a belt-and-suspenders for sequelize-typescript's @Table / @Column decorators, which esbuild rejects unless this flag is enabled in the closest tsconfig it finds.
